{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201814551962C0B08BDC554289A9"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607358415637840664","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容很新奇，好看且没有毒点，就是只能说作者的压抑程度堪比青春期男初高中生，折戟把酒诗煌翩，剑指黄道魅游边。
还有就是我觉得这书应该把前缀改一改，感觉可能搜综漫的受众不一定喜欢这个，不如把前缀改成宝可梦或者逆转宝可梦之类的，反正后面都说了抓动漫女主了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771231472,"group_id":"7603201854582819865","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw3qj0Ur4RkMbWeeHClBKGU0Mv9A5nWIprKF2Ncm4zQ1","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4e11be937838443e9ca05a4d71c770dc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529427&x-signature=Fyf4YoFfIcOO6szQxkll9t8BENs%3D","user_id":"1095568971008430","user_name":"在王维的诗里"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1095568971008430","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1735439728,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603201854582819865","book_info":{"abstract":"    【涉及超多游戏或动漫女主或男主，剧情新颖】
    枫羽意外来到宝可梦动漫的异世界。
    这里人类是宝可梦，精灵是控球的那位。
    自己也成为全系神兽。
    误打误撞成为了沙奈朵的宝可梦。
    不知不觉中更是卷入本世界精灵与人类宝可梦两大阵营漩涡中。
    18派系宝可梦王者中。
    黑胡子为首的阵营要弄死他。
    汉库克阵营要守护他。
    还有一个一心要扶持自己当幽灵系王者的不良帅袁天罡。
    宝可梦这边很乱。
    24精灵天王中。
    天王裂空中为首一心想让苏羽作为精灵与人类的桥梁让世界和平。
    更是让多位天王屈神保护。
    本以为在和睦的精灵地界会安稳发育的苏羽。
    却遇到天王桃歹郎为首的邪恶势力。
    还好此时苏羽收复了大量动漫或游戏的妹子作为自身战斗力，有了一定自保实力与势力，与此世界一心要搞死自己的天王或王者们抗衡。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of5f35ebceaa6535c8ee4cfc531984db2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"镇压不住的叛逆者","author_id":"","book_id":"7603201854582819865","book_name":"综漫：动漫女主成为我的战斗宠物","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e0b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3184人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":859,"name":"宝可梦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=859&name=宝可梦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":371,"name":"神奇宝贝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=371&name=神奇宝贝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603203580966748697","read_count":"3184","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"305725"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"157","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,宝可梦,神奇宝贝,系统,综漫,宠物,穿越,诸天万界","thumb_url":"https://
